name: Roast Venison
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the meat stand at room temperature for 8 hours.
2. Marinade the venison overnight in the refrigerator using the MARINADE mixture. This opens the pores of the meat when it is at room temperature and draws in the marinade when cooling.
3. Season with salt, roll in flour, and brown in a hot skillet.
4. Place the seasoned venison in a crock-pot cooker.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, vinegar or lemon juice, garlic, prepared mustard, red wine).
6. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours.
MARINADE: Mix all ingredients together in a bowl large enough to cover the venison with water. No need to stir this marinade. Use for "red" meats or game birds.
